nasb.text: Then came the first day of Unleavened Bread on which the Passover lamb had to be sacrificed.

esv.text: Then came the day of Unleavened Bread, on which the Passover lamb had to be sacrificed.

cnv.text: 除酵日到了，在這一天應當宰殺逾越節的羊羔。

ccb.text: 除酵节到了，那天要宰杀逾越羊羔。

csbs.text: 除酵节的第一日到了，在这一天必须宰杀逾越节的羔羊。
